original_image_tags: A stamped "RESTRICTED" classification label appears at the top center of the document. A small black hole-punch artifact is visible to the left of the stamp.
A black circular stamp is located to the right of the "RESTRICTED" label, partially obscured by a handwritten annotation.
A handwritten annotation in cursive ink in the upper right corner reads "Capt Hathway File".
In the upper left corner, "CM 175" is handwritten in blue pencil.
A handwritten signature is present in the signature block, appearing to read "M. D. GENTRY".
A red "RESTRICTED" stamp appears in the bottom right corner of the page.

elements.description: Two 'RESTRICTED' stamps at the top and bottom of the page.
A faded, circular 'RECEIVED' stamp at the bottom center containing illegible text and a date.

judge.reason: Descriptions contradict on the number, location, and text of stamps: A identifies a 'RESTRICTED' stamp at top center and bottom right, while B identifies 'RESTRICTED' stamps at top and bottom and a 'RECEIVED' stamp, with no overlap in other key elements like handwritten annotations or signature.
